title: 「There is / are + -ing」句型
titleZh: 「There is / are + -ing」描述場景中正在發生的事情
titleEn: Using There is / are + -ing to describe an unfolding scene

source.file: Sentence Sturcture 39 -「There is _ are + -ing」描述場景中正在發生的事情.pdf

formula: There + be + noun phrase + verb-ing + other information

formulas.formula: There + be + noun phrase + verb-ing + other information
Place / Time + there + be + noun phrase + verb-ing + other information
There is + singular / uncountable noun + verb-ing
There was + singular / uncountable noun + verb-ing

example: There were a lot of people watching the show.
exampleZh: 當時有很多人在觀看表演。

examples.en: There were a lot of people watching the show.
examples.zh: 當時有很多人在觀看表演。
examples.highlight: There were a lot of people watching

meaning.zh: 這個句型先帶出場景中出現的人、動物或事物，再立即說明對方正在做甚麼。

rules.en: The verb be agrees with the noun after it.
rules.zh: Be 動詞須與後面的名詞配合：單數名詞或不可數名詞使用 is / was；複數名詞使用 are / were。
examples: There is / was a boy waiting outside.
There are / were three students waiting outside.
There is a group of children playing outside.
There are a number of residents asking questions.

rules.zh: 正在進行 -ing 動作的是名詞，而不是 there；there 只用來帶出場景中有甚麼人或事物。
examples: There is a girl singing on the stage.

rules.en: A place or time phrase may come before or after the structure.
rules.zh: 地點或時間可以放在句末，也可以放在句首。
examples: There are two children playing in the park.
In the park, there are two children playing.

rules.en: Negative and question forms are allowed.
rules.zh: 可以使用否定句和問句形式。
examples: There aren't any buses running now.
Are there any students studying in the library?

rules.en: Do not omit the noun before the -ing verb.
rules.zh: Ing 動詞前必須有一個正在進行動作的人或事物；下雨應說 It is raining，而不是 There is raining。
examples: There is water dripping from the ceiling.

benefits.zh: 先清楚交代場景中有甚麼人或事物，再說明正在發生的動作。

benefits.en: It combines presence and action in one sentence.
benefits.zh: 不需要先寫某人在場，再另寫一句說明動作；可把兩項資料合併成一句。

benefits.en: It is useful for describing pictures, places and events.
benefits.zh: 適合描述圖片、街道、課室、活動現場或眼前正在發生的事情。

benefits.en: It helps you introduce new people or things naturally.
benefits.zh: 可以自然地把新人物或事物帶入場景，特別適合開始描述一幅畫面。

benefits.en: It gives you more ways to organise a sentence.
benefits.zh: 可以用 There 開始，也可以先寫地點或時間，使句首更有變化。

en: Rewrite each sentence using there + be + noun phrase + -ing to describe who or what is present and what is happening.
Keep the original tense and meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 there + be + 名詞詞組 + -ing 改寫以下句子，以描述場景中有誰或有甚麼正在進行某個動作。
答案須保留原句的時態和意思。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: A boy is waiting outside the classroom.
questions.promptZh: 一名男孩正在課室外等候。
questions.answer: There is a boy waiting outside the classroom.
questions.answerZh: 課室外有一名男孩正在等候。
